metadata.description: Harness-agnostic standards, skills, and rules for AI coding agents. Generated from skills/ — see scripts/build-claude.sh.

plugins.name: core-standards
plugins.description: Cross-stack engine and universal skills. work-principles, planning, universal-rules, verification, verify-changes, codebase-index, auth-flows, craft-config, subagent-brief, honesty (no unsourced claims, evidence before done), spec-validator, contracts, challenger, contract-tests, integration, full-setup — production autonomous pipeline from single prompt to verified delivery.

plugins.name: flutter-standards
plugins.description: Flutter-specific standards — engineering (Dart, widget rules, data layer, api-data patterns), accessibility (Semantics, screen readers, 48dp touch targets), performance (DevTools, frame budget, const widgets). app-audit (full Flutter audit: pre-ship checks + craft quality + screen states). scaffold (feature + screen file structure generator). scan (hardcoded values, duplicate code, a11y patterns). Pair with mobile-standards for craft-guide, production-readiness, forms, and observability.

plugins.name: mobile-standards
plugins.description: Mobile-universal standards — craft quality, production readiness, forms, observability, design tokens. Applies to Flutter, React Native, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose. Auto-invoked by description triggers.

plugins.name: api-standards
plugins.description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards, cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header standard, versioned routes), websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). db-migrations workflow (Prisma schema → migration → client regeneration).

plugins.name: web-standards
plugins.description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15) standards; premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — shadow formula, OKLCH dark grays, easing, tabular-nums); taste (metric dials: DESIGN_VARIANCE/MOTION_INTENSITY/VISUAL_DENSITY, AI-tells forbidden list); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth. Platform-agnostic design skills (accessibility, information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence) moved to design-standards plugin.

plugins.name: design-standards
plugins.description: Platform-agnostic design pack — applies to Web, iOS, and Android. accessibility (WCAG 2.2 + Swift traits + Compose semantics), information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence, design-laws (color strategy axis, anti-AI-slop, absolute visual bans, category-reflex check — from pbakaus/impeccable), brand-research (fact verification before designing + asset collection: logo → product imagery → UI screenshots → color → font), creative-direction (signals that separate memorable from functional-but-forgettable UI).
